packageSummary:
**Summary:** Experience the ultimate Maldivian getaway with the 'Maldives - The Residence at Falhumaafushi' package, a 5-day journey to the stunning islands of the Maldives. This package offers a luxurious stay at a beach villa (no pool) or water villa, complete with an all-inclusive meal plan, return domestic flight, speedboat transfers, green tax, and travel insurance. Enjoy breathtaking views, serene surroundings, and endless opportunities for relaxation and adventure.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Male, Meals: Dinner
- Arrive at the airport in Male, the capital city of the Maldives.
- Check-in at the hotel and enjoy the rest of the day at leisure.

**Day 2:** Male, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner
- Spend the day at leisure, exploring the island on your own.

**Day 3:** Male, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner
- Continue to enjoy the day at leisure, exploring the island and its many attractions.

**Day 4:** Male, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner
- Enjoy the day at leisure, with time to relax and recharge.

**Day 5:** Departure, Meals: Breakfast
- Check-out of the hotel and depart from Male, taking back memories of an unforgettable Maldivian experience.

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodation in Beach Villa (no pool) or Water Villa
- All-inclusive meal plan
- Return domestic flight
- Speedboat transfers
- Green tax
- Travel insurance (up to age of 60 yrs.)

**Complimentary:**

- Free upgrade to Water Villa (no pool) or Water Villa with Pool, subject to availability
- 1-time 90-minute sunset dolphin cruise per person per stay
- Romantic in-villa bath set-up (once during stay)
- Enjoy 15% discount off Ala Carte Treatment at The Spa by Clarins

**Honeymoon Freebies:**

- A bottle of wine on arrival
- Romantic in-villa bath set-up (once during stay)
- Enjoy 15% discount off Ala Carte Treatment at The Spa by Clarins

**Exclusions:**

- TCS & GST
- International airfare and visa charges
- Guaranteed early check-in or late check-out
- Any expenses of personal nature
- Tips and porterage
- Meals other than those mentioned in the itinerary
- Drinks, including water, during meals and sightseeing tours

**Terms and Conditions:**

- Cancellation fee will not be charged if booking is cancelled 15 days prior to the date of arrival
- Cancellations within 15 to 8 days prior to the date of arrival: 75% of the total will be charged
- Cancellation within 10 days and below to the date of arrival: No Show bookings and cancellations within the stay will be charged for the total stay on the basis booked

**Payment Policy:**

- For all travel periods (excluding 24th Dec’20 to 8th Jan’21): 100% payment is to be paid 21 days prior to the check-in
- For travel period 24th Dec’20 to 8th Jan’21: 100% payment is to be paid 60 days prior to the check-in

**Summary:**
The 'Customizable - Escape To Kerala' package is an 8-day tour that explores the beautiful landscapes of Kerala, India. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as the Dutch Palace, St. Francis Church, and Jewish Synagogue in Kochi, the Eravikulam National Park, Mattupetty Dam, and Old Munnar Town in Munnar, the Thiruvananthapuram city and the famous Kanyakumari Temple and Vivekananda Rock Memorial.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Kochi, Meals: N/A, Description: Arrival in Kochi and transfer to the hotel. Check into the hotel and enjoy rest of the day at leisure. Late in the afternoon, take a sightseeing tour of Kochi visiting the Dutch Palace, St. Francis Church, Jewish Synagogue and see the Chinese fishing nets on the harbour.

**Day 2:** Kochi - Munnar (135kms/4hrs), Meals: Breakfast, Description: Drive to Munnar, a beautiful hill station. Arrive by the afternoon. Check into the hotel and enjoy rest of the day at leisure or one can go and explore the local market.

**Day 3:** Munnar, Meals: Breakfast, Description: Take a sightseeing tour of Munnar visiting the Eravikulam National Park, Mattupetty Dam, Old Munnar Town and the town market. Enjoy rest of the day at leisure.

**Day 5:** Thekkady – Alleppey (130kms/4hrs), Meals: Breakfast, Description: Check out of the hotel. Drive to Alleppey and arrive by the afternoon, Check into the hotel and enjoy rest of the day at leisure or take an optional cruise on the backwaters.

**Day 6:** Alleppey – Kovalam / Poovar / Trivandrum (190kms/4.5hrs), Meals: Breakfast, Description: Drive from Alleppey and reach Kovalam. Kovalam the beach town located by the beautiful Arabian sea can be found situated within the boundaries of Thiruvananthapuram city of Kerala. As you reach Kovalam, check into the resort. Unwind and revive already heavily ornate crown of Kovalam.

**Day 7:** Kovalam / Poovar / Trivandrum Excursion to Kanyakumari, Meals: Breakfast, Description: Visit Shri Padmanabhswamy Temple & Napier Museum. After sightseeing we will drive further to Kanyakumari and visit Kanyakumari Temple and Vivekananda Rock Memorial. After visiting the attractions, you will be driven back to the hotel for a comfortable stay.

**Day 8:** Depart Kovalam / Poovar / Trivandrum, Meals: Breakfast, Description: Check out of the hotel. Drive to Trivandrum airport/railway station for your onward journey.

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodation in Twin/Double sharing basis in mentioned or similar hotels
- 07 breakfasts and 07 dinners
- Transportation by A/c vehicle for arrival / departure transfers and sightseeing as per the itinerary
- Assistance at the airport while arriving and departing
- All transfers, sightseeing and intercity travel

**Mics. charges are inclusive of:**

- GST as per prevailing rates
- All applicable luxury/road taxes

**Exclusions:**

- Airfares, trainfares
- Any monument entrance fees, Any Joy ride or rafting
- Medical expenses (apart from first aid) and insurance of any kind
- Tips, laundry, liquors, wines, mineral water, telephone charges, camera fee and items of personal nature
- Transportation is not on disposal basis. It is strictly as per the programme, any extra running will be charged extra

Here's a summary of the 'Kenyan Dhamaka (Joining Direct Only)' package:

**Summary:**

Embark on a thrilling 6-day journey through the breathtaking landscapes of Kenya. The 'Kenyan Dhamaka (Joining Direct Only)' package takes you to the majestic Aberdare National Park, the picturesque Lake Elementaita, and the stunning Masai Mara Game Reserve. Enjoy exciting game drives, leisurely activities, and a range of exciting experiences amidst the beautiful Kenyan wilderness. This package offers an unforgettable adventure for travelers, with a unique blend of nature, wildlife, and culture.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Nairobi, Meals: N/A, Description: Welcome to Kenya
**Day 2:** Aberdare, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Aberdare National Park
**Day 3:** Lake Elmenteita, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Lake Elementaita
**Day 4:** Masai Mara, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Masai Mara Game Reserve
**Day 5:** Masai Mara, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Full day of game-viewing at Masai Mara
**Day 6:** Departure, Meals: Breakfast, Description: Time to say good–bye to the animals

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodations at the hotels specified above or similar
- Sightseeing, accommodation & services as per the above-mentioned itinerary
- Services of English speaking driver / guide
- Bottled mineral water during safaris
- Transport in seven seater NON AC safari 4x4 land cruiser with a pop up roof for easy game viewing

**Mics. charges are inclusive of:**

- Accommodation in Twin/Double sharing basis in starting room category at each place
- 04 breakfasts and 04 lunches and 05 dinners
- Transportation by NAC Xylo / Scorpio / Innova (as per availability) for arrival / departure transfers and sightseeing as per the itinerary
- Assistance at the airport while arriving and departing

**Exclusions:**

- Return economy class group airfare as per the itinerary
- Travel Insurance
- Visa charges
- TCTP/SYBA
- Tips & Porterage
- Any other expenses of personal nature such as laundry expenses, mini-bar, mineral water, telephone charges, foods and beverages that are not included as a part of the package
- Additional Meals which is not specifically included in the above itinerary
- Cost of excursions, city sightseeing, entrance fees and local guides availed of by the passengers, other than that mentioned in the above itinerary
- Cost of Optional Excursions
- GST & TCS
- Any other item not mentioned in the cost includes section

**Summary:**

Experience the ultimate honeymoon getaway in the breathtakingly beautiful Maldives with our 'Honeymoon Special - Maldives - Reethi Faru - 04 Nights 05 Days' package. Enjoy a relaxing 5-day stay in this tropical paradise, with 4 nights of luxurious accommodation in a Deluxe Beach Bungalow, complete with a full board meal plan. Take a romantic return seaplane transfer and explore the beautiful island of Reethi Faru, known for its pristine beaches, crystal-clear waters, and lush greenery.

**Highlights:**

- 4 nights of accommodation in a Deluxe Beach Bungalow
- Full board meal plan
- Return seaplane transfer
- Green Tax and Travel Insurance (up to age 60) included
- Visit to the beautiful island of Reethi Faru

**Itinerary:**

Day 1: Arrival in Male
- Arrive in Male and transfer to your hotel
- Spend the day at leisure, exploring the island

Day 2-5: Reethi Faru Island
- Enjoy breakfast and lunch at the hotel
- Spend the day at leisure, exploring the island and its beautiful beaches
- Take a romantic seaplane transfer back to Male on Day 5

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodation in a Deluxe Beach Bungalow
- Full board meal plan
- Return seaplane transfer
- Green Tax
- Travel Insurance (up to age 60)
- Assistance at the airport and hotel

**Exclusions:**

- International Airfare and Visa Charges
- TCS and GST
- Any expenses of personal nature
- Tips and porterage
- Meals other than those mentioned in the itinerary
- Drinks including water during meals/sightseeing tours

**Product Terms and Conditions:**

- The package price is valid until 30 June 2024
- The upgrade hotel/villa prices are subject to availability at the time of booking
- The upgrade hotel/villa prices do not guarantee rooms at the envisaged hotels/villa
- The rates are valid for minimum 02 adults traveling together at all times
- The rates are not valid on block out dates
- Surcharges as and when applicable will be advised and passengers will be requested to pay the same
- Some flights depart from India on a previous date and arrive at the destination the next day of departure, and likewise for the return flight to India.

**Summary:** The 'Australian Extravaganza - Durga Puja Special' package is an 11-day tour that explores the vibrant city of Melbourne, the tropical paradise of Cairns, the entertainment capital of Gold Coast, and the iconic city of Sydney. The itinerary includes visits to famous landmarks such as the Great Ocean Road, Sea World, Movie World, the Sydney Opera House, and the Blue Mountains. Participants will enjoy scenic drives, guided tours, and a range of exciting activities, including a visit to the Kuranda village, a thrilling jet boat ride, and a scenic flight over the Great Barrier Reef. The tour also includes meals, accommodations, and transportation in Australia.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Melbourne, Meals: Dinner
- Arrive in Melbourne and check-in at the hotel.
- Spend the day acclimatizing to the high altitude and exploring the city.

**Day 2:** Melbourne, Meals: Breakfast, Local Lunch and Dinner
- Visit the Great Ocean Road and enjoy the scenic views of the coastline.
- Enjoy local lunch and dinner at a local restaurant.

**Day 3:** Cairns, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner
- Take a flight to Cairns and check-in at the hotel.
- Visit the Kuranda village and enjoy the scenic views of the rainforest.

**Day 4:** Cairns, Meals: Breakfast, Local Lunch and Dinner
- Take a thrilling jet boat ride and enjoy the scenic views of the city.
- Visit the famous Sea World and enjoy the shows and attractions.

**Day 5:** Gold Coast, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner
- Take a flight to Gold Coast and check-in at the hotel.
- Visit the famous Movie World and enjoy the shows and attractions.

**Day 6:** Gold Coast, Meals: Breakfast, Local Lunch and Dinner
- Take a visit to the famous Sydney Opera House and enjoy the scenic views of the city.
- Enjoy local lunch and dinner at a local restaurant.

**Day 7:** Sydney, Meals: Breakfast, Local Lunch and Dinner
- Take a visit to the famous Blue Mountains and enjoy the scenic views of the mountains.
- Enjoy local lunch and dinner at a local restaurant.

**Day 8:** Sydney, Meals: Breakfast
- Spend the day exploring the city and its markets.
- Check-out from the hotel and depart from Sydney.

**Inclusions:**

- Return economy class group airfare as per the itinerary.
- All local taxes & services as of 1st Feb, 2024.
- Cost of Visa & Medical Insurance for the duration of the tour.
- Sightseeing, accommodation & services as per the above mentioned itinerary.
- All transfers & excursions with entrance fees (as specified in the itinerary) by a deluxe air-conditioned coach.
- Services of a professional, friendly & multilingual Thomas Cook I Ltd Tour Manager (Subject to minimum 30 customers) or a local Representative.

**Exclusions:**

- Any increase in the airfare charged by the airline on your air ticket (presently calculated as of 1st Feb 2024).
- Mandatory Tipping for on tour Services (Coach Driver, Local Guides etc.).
- PCR test in India & Australia.
- Applicable Government Taxes are additional.
- The tour cost does not include POE charges & passport charges.
- No porterage included.
- Any expenses of personal nature such as porterage, laundry expenses, mini-bar, mineral water, telephone charges, food & drink that are not a part of the package.
- Additional Meals that is not mentioned in the above itinerary.
- Cost of excursions, city sightseeing, entrance fees & local guides availed of by the passengers, other than that mentioned in the above itinerary.
- Cost of Optional Excursions.
- There is a possibility that your Tour Manager could change in-between the tour.

**Summary:** The 'Honeymoon Special - Maldives - Villa Park 04 Nights 05 Days' package is a 5-day tour to the beautiful Maldives. The itinerary includes 2 nights in a beach villa and 2 nights in a water villa, with a meal plan of full board. Participants will enjoy return speedboat transfers, green tax, and travel insurance (up to age 60) for the travel duration. The package also includes accommodation at a hotel, with an upgrade option available for an additional fee. Exclusions include international airfare and visa charges, tips and porterage, and any expenses of a personal nature. 

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Male, Meals: Dinner
- Arrive in Male and check-in at the hotel (standard 1400 hrs.)
- Enjoy the rest of the day at leisure.

**Day 2 - 4:** Male, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner
- Enjoy breakfast at the hotel
- Explore the island on your own and enjoy the rest of the day at leisure
- Overnight at the resort.

**Day 5:** Departure from Male, Meals: Breakfast
- After breakfast, check out (standard 1200 hrs.)
- Transfer from the hotel to International Airport for the departure flight back to India or to your onwards destination.

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodation in 2 Nts Beach villa + 2 Nts Water Villa
- Meal Plan as per selection – Full Board
- Return Speedboat transfers
- Green Tax
- Travel Insurance (up to age of 60 yrs.) for the travel duration

**Exclusions:**

- TCS & GST
- International Airfare & Visa Charges
- Guaranteed early check in or late check-out
- Any expenses of personal nature
- Tips and porterage
- Meals other than that what is mentioned in your itinerary
- Drinks including Water during meals / sightseeing tours are not included
- RT-PCR Test
- Any services not mentioned in the inclusions list

**Product Terms and Conditions:**

- The upgrade hotel/villa prices are subject to availability at the time of booking.
- The upgrade hotel/villa prices DO NOT GUARANTEE rooms at the envisaged hotels/Villa.
- The upgrade hotel/villa rooms are subject to availability at the time of booking.
- The rates are valid for minimum 02 adults travelling together at all times.
- The rates are not valid on block out dates.
- Surcharges as and when applicable will be advised and passengers would be requested to pay the same
- Surcharges could be over and above the total package price quoted to the passengers at the time of booking.

**Summary:** The 'Customizable - Sensational Singapore' package is a 7-day tour that offers an exciting exploration of Singapore. The itinerary includes a mix of city tours, cultural experiences, and relaxing activities. Participants will enjoy sightseeing, meals, and accommodations as per the itinerary. The package provides a customizable experience, allowing travelers to choose their preferred hotels.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Singapore, Meals: 
- Arrive at Singapore Airport and check-in at the hotel.
- Spend the day exploring the city and its surroundings.

**Day 2:** Singapore Excursion, Meals: 
- Visit the iconic Merlion and explore the city's major attractions.
- Enjoy the evening at leisure, taking in the city's vibrant atmosphere.

**Day 3:** Singapore to Sentosa Island, Meals: 
- Visit the Universal Studios Singapore and enjoy the thrilling rides.
- Relax on the beautiful beaches of Sentosa Island.

**Day 4:** Singapore to Gardens by the Bay, Meals: 
- Explore the breathtaking Gardens by the Bay, featuring stunning floral displays.
- Enjoy the evening at leisure, taking in the beauty of the gardens.

**Day 5:** Singapore to Marina Bay Sands, Meals: 
- Visit the famous Marina Bay Sands, a stunning example of modern architecture.
- Explore the shopping centers and take in the views of the bay.

**Day 6:** Singapore to Little India, Meals: 
- Visit the vibrant Little India, featuring colorful street art and cultural attractions.
- Enjoy the evening at leisure, taking in the sights and sounds of the area.

**Day 7:** Departure, Meals: 
- Bid farewell to the tour and depart from Singapore.

**Inclusions:**

- Hotel accommodation as per selection
- Return Airport Transfers
- Sightseeings & meals as per itinerary

**Mics. charges are inclusive of:**

- Hotel accommodation
- Return airport transfers
- Sightseeing and meals as per the itinerary

**Exclusions:**

- Airfare (Subject to selection)
- Travel Insurance
- 5% GST + TCS (If Implemented)
- Applicable in India

**Summary:**

The 'Highlights Of Scandinavia Fjord Cruise With 4 Nights Denmark (Summer 2024)' package is a 12-day tour that explores the breathtaking landscapes of Scandinavia and Denmark. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as Kiel, Germany, and Copenhagen, Denmark, as well as a tour of the beautiful fjords and scenic drives through Norway. Participants will enjoy a fjord cruise, guided tours, and a range of exciting activities, including a visit to the famous Little Mermaid statue and the iconic Parliament building in Copenhagen.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Copenhagen, Meals: Dinner
- Arrive at Copenhagen Airport and check-in at the hotel.
- Spend the day acclimatizing to the city.

**Day 2:** Copenhagen Excursion, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Visit the Rosklide Cathedral and the Viking Ship Museum.
- Visit the Hans Christian Anderson House and Egeskov Castle.

**Day 3:** Copenhagen to Malmo, Meals: Breakfast
- Drive to Malmo, Sweden's third largest city.
- Stop for a photo-op of the Oresund Bridge and the Turning Torso building.

**Day 4:** Fjord Cruise, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner
- Board your cruise and set sail for the fjords.
- Enjoy the onboard amenities and scenic views of Norway.

**Day 5:** Fjord Cruise, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner
- High seas and relaxation time on board.
- Enjoy the onboard amenities and scenic views of Norway.

**Day 6:** Bergen, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner
- Arrive in Bergen and explore the city.
- Visit the famous fish market and enjoy the scenic views of the fjords.

**Day 7:** Bergen, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner
- Continue to explore the city and its surroundings.
- Visit the famous Fantoft Stave Church and enjoy the scenic views of the fjords.

**Day 8:** Kiel, Meals: Cruise Breakfast and Dinner
- Arrive in Kiel, Germany and explore the city.
- Visit the famous Kiel Fjord and enjoy the scenic views.

**Day 9:** Copenhagen, Meals: Breakfast
- Arrive in Copenhagen and explore the city.
- Visit the famous Little Mermaid statue and the iconic Parliament building.

**Day 10:** Copenhagen, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Continue to explore the city and its surroundings.
- Visit the famous Tivoli Gardens and enjoy the scenic views of the city.

**Day 11:** Departure, Meals: Breakfast
- Bid farewell to the tour and depart from Copenhagen.

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodation in Twin/Double sharing basis in starting room category at each place
- 10 breakfasts and 9 dinners
- Transportation by NAC Xylo / Scorpio / Innova (as per availability) for arrival / departure transfers and sightseeing as per the itinerary
- Assistance at the airport while arriving and departing
- Oxygen Cylinder in each vehicle while traveling to Nubra/Pangong Only
- Travel Insurance (for age below 69yrs)

**Mics. charges are inclusive of:**

- Denmark, Norway, and Germany visa fees
- Inner-line permits
- Porterage at hotel and airport
- All applicable luxury/road taxes

**Exclusions:**

- GST will be applicable as per prevailing rates
- Airfares trainfare
- Any monastery entrance fees, Any Joy ride or rafting
- Medical expenses (apart from first aid) and insurance of any kind
- Tips, laundry, liquors, wines, mineral water, telephone charges, camera fee and items of personal nature
- Transportation is not on disposal basis. It is strictly as per the programme, any extra running will be charged extra
- Any expenses arising out of unforeseen circumstances like flight delay / cancellation / hike in fare, strike or any other natural calamities or any emergency evacuation expenses
- Any other item not mentioned in the cost includes section

**Summary:** The 'Customizable - Gangtok Pelling Darjeeling' package is a 6-day tour that explores the breathtaking landscapes of Gangtok, Pelling, and Darjeeling, India. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as Rumtek Monastery, Tshangu Lake, Pelling village, and Darjeeling Ropeway Ride, as well as a tour of the ancient monasteries of Sikkim. Participants will enjoy scenic drives, guided tours, and a range of exciting activities, including a visit to the famous Hemis Gompa monastery.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Gangtok, Meals: Dinner
- Arrive at NJP Station / Bagdogra Airport and check-in at the hotel in Gangtok.
- Spend the day acclimatizing to the high altitude and exploring the city.

**Day 2:** Gangtok Excursion, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Visit the Rumtek Monastery, Jhakri Water Fall, Do-rul Chhorten, Research Institute of Tibetology, Directorate of Handicraft & Handloom, and Flower Show.
- Explore the city and its markets.

**Day 3:** Gangtok to Pelling, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Drive to Pelling (116 Km / 04 hours) and check-in at the hotel.
- Visit the Pelling village and explore the local market.

**Day 4:** Pelling Excursion, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Visit the Yuksom village (35 Kms / 02 Hrs) and the Khecheopalri Lake (6000 Ft / 1829 Mts).
- Return to Pelling and enjoy the evening at leisure.

**Day 5:** Pelling to Darjeeling, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Drive to Darjeeling (125 Kms / 05 to 06 Hrs) and check-in at the hotel.
- Visit the Darjeeling Ropeway Ride, Ghoom Monastery, and the Himalayan Mountaineering Institute.

**Day 6:** Darjeeling, Meals: Breakfast
- Visit the Tiger Hills (8364 Ft / 2550 Mts) to view sunrise over Kanchendzonga Peak.
- Bid farewell to the tour and depart from Darjeeling.

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodation in Twin/Double sharing basis in starting room category at each place
- 07 breakfasts and 07 dinners
- Transportation by A/c vehicle for arrival / departure transfers and sightseeing as per the itinerary
- Assistance at the airport while arriving and departing
- Oxygen Cylinder in each vehicle while traveling to Nubra/Pangong Only

**Mics. charges are inclusive of:**

- All applicable luxury/road taxes
- Inner-line permits
- Porterage at hotel and airport
- Ladakh Royalty Fee

**Exclusions:**

- GST will be applicable as per prevailing rates
- Airfares trainfare
- Any monastery entrance fees, Any Joy ride or rafting
- Medical expenses (apart from first aid) and insurance of any kind
- Tips, laundry, liquors, wines, mineral water, telephone charges, camera fee and items of personal nature
- Transportation is not on disposal basis. It is strictly as per the programme, any extra running will be charged extra
- Any expenses arising out of unforeseen circumstances like flight delay / cancellation / hike in fare, strike or any other natural calamities or any emergency evacuation expenses
- Any other item not mentioned in the cost includes section

**Summary:** The 'Customizable - Gangtok Kalimpong Darjeeling 5N' package is a 6-day tour that explores the breathtaking landscapes of Gangtok, Kalimpong, and Darjeeling, India. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as Rumtek Monastery, Jhakri Water Fall, and Tshangu Lake, as well as a tour of the ancient monasteries of the region. Participants will enjoy scenic drives, guided tours, and a range of exciting activities, including a visit to the famous Hemis Gompa monastery and a trek to the Singalila National Park.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Gangtok, Meals: Dinner
- Arrive at NJP Station / Bagdogra Airport and check-in at the hotel.
- Spend the day acclimatizing to the high altitude and exploring the city.

**Day 2:** Gangtok Excursion, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Visit the Rumtek Monastery, Jhakri Water Fall, Do-rul Chhorten, Research Institute of Tibetology (Closed on Sunday), Directorate of Handicraft & Handloom (Closed on Sunday) and Flower Show.
- Enjoy the evening at leisure.

**Day 3:** Gangtok to Tshangu Lake, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Visit the Baba Mandir & Tshangu Lake - situated at a height of 12400Ft / 3780 Mts.
- Enjoy the beauty of the lake and the surrounding mountains.

**Day 4:** Gangtok to Kalimpong, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Drive to Kalimpong and visit the Kalimpong view point.
- Explore the town and its markets.

**Day 5:** Kalimpong to Darjeeling, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Drive to Darjeeling and visit the Darjeeling view point.
- Explore the town and its markets.

**Day 6:** Departure, Meals: Breakfast
- Bid farewell to the tour and depart from Darjeeling.

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodation in Twin/Double sharing basis in starting room category at each place
- 05 breakfasts and 05 dinners
- Transportation by NAC Xylo / Scorpio / Innova (as per availability) for arrival / departure transfers and sightseeing as per the itinerary
- Assistance at the airport while arriving and departing
- Oxygen Cylinder in each vehicle while traveling to Nubra/Pangong Only
- Travel Insurance (for age below 69yrs)

**Mics. charges are inclusive of:**

- Gangtok Royalty Fee
- Inner-line permits
- Porterage at hotel and airport
- All applicable luxury/road taxes

**Exclusions:**

- GST will be applicable as per prevailing rates
- Airfares trainfare
- Any monastery entrance fees, Any Joy ride or rafting
- Medical expenses (apart from first aid) and insurance of any kind
- Tips, laundry, liquors, wines, mineral water, telephone charges, camera fee and items of personal nature
- Transportation is not on disposal basis. It is strictly as per the programme, any extra running will be charged extra
- Any expenses arising out of unforeseen circumstances like flight delay / cancellation / hike in fare, strike or any other natural calamities or any emergency evacuation expenses
- Any other item not mentioned in the cost includes section

**Summary:** The 'Customizable - Gangtok Pelling Darjeeling Kalimpong' package is a 7-day tour that explores the breathtaking landscapes of Sikkim, India. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as Kanchenjunga Mountain, Rumtek Monastery, and Tshangu Lake, as well as a tour of the ancient monasteries of Sikkim. Participants will enjoy scenic drives, guided tours, and a range of exciting activities, including a visit to the famous Hemis Gompa monastery and a tour of the Tibetan Refugee Self-Help Center.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Gangtok, Meals: Dinner
- Arrive at NJP Station / Bagdogra Airport and check-in at the hotel.
- Spend the day acclimatizing to the high altitude and exploring the city.

**Day 2:** Gangtok Excursion, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Visit the Rumtek Monastery, Jhakri Water Fall, Do-rul Chhorten, Research Institute of Tibetology, and Flower Show.
- Overnight at Hotel in Gangtok.

**Day 3:** Gangtok to Pelling, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Transfer to Pelling (5500 Ft / 1675 Mts) and check-in at the hotel.
- Overnight at Hotel in Pelling.

**Day 4:** Pelling Excursion, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Visit the Yuksom (5840 Ft / 1780 Mts), Darap Village, Rimbi Water fall & Hydro Project, Khecheopalri Lake, and Kanchanjunga Water fall.
- Overnight at Hotel in Pelling.

**Day 5:** Pelling to Darjeeling, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Transfer to Darjeeling (6710 Ft / 2046 Mts) and check-in at the hotel.
- Overnight at Hotel in Darjeeling.

**Day 6:** Darjeeling Excursion, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Visit the Tiger Hills (8364 Ft / 2550 Mts) to view sunrise over Kanchendzonga Peak, Ghoom Monastery, Batasia Loop, Japanese Temple, Peace pagoda, Padmaja Naidu Himalayan Zoological Park & Himalayan Mountaineering Institute.
- Overnight at Hotel in Darjeeling.

**Day 7:** Departure from Darjeeling, Meals: Breakfast
- Bid farewell to the tour and depart from Darjeeling.

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodation in Twin/Double sharing basis in starting room category at each place
- 07 breakfasts and 07 dinners
- Transportation by A/c vehicle for arrival / departure transfers and sightseeing as per the itinerary
- Assistance at the airport while arriving and departing
- Travel Insurance (for age below 69yrs)

**Mics. charges are inclusive of:**

- Accommodation in the mentioned or similar hotels

**Summary:** The 'Customizable - Gangtok Lachung Gangtok Darjeeling' package is an 8-day tour that explores the breathtaking landscapes and cultural heritage of Gangtok, Lachung, and Darjeeling. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as Rumtek Monastery, Jhakri Water Fall, and Thiksey Monastery, as well as a tour of the ancient monasteries and scenic drives. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and a range of exciting activities, including a visit to the Tshangu Lake and a tour of the famous Hemis Gompa monastery.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Gangtok, Meals: Dinner
- Arrive at NJP Station / Bagdogra Airport and check-in at the hotel.
- Spend the day acclimatizing to the high altitude and exploring the city.

**Day 2:** Gangtok Excursion, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Visit the Rumtek Monastery, Jhakri Water Fall, and Research Institute of Tibetology.
- Visit the Do-rul Chhorten and explore the city and its markets.

**Day 3:** Gangtok - Tshangu Lake, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Drive to Tshangu Lake, the highest saltwater lake in the world.
- Enjoy the beauty of the lake and the surrounding mountains.

**Day 4:** Gangtok - Lachung, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Drive to Lachung and check-in at the hotel.
- Explore the village and its surroundings.

**Day 5:** Lachung - Gangtok, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Drive back to Gangtok and visit the Hemis Gompa monastery.
- Explore the city and its markets.

**Day 6:** Gangtok Excursion, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Visit the Thiksey Monastery, Shey Palace, and Sindhu Ghat.
- Enjoy the evening at leisure.

**Day 7:** Gangtok - Darjeeling, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Drive to Darjeeling and check-in at the hotel.
- Explore the city and its surroundings.

**Day 8:** Departure, Meals: Breakfast
- Bid farewell to the tour and depart from Darjeeling.

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodation in Twin/Double sharing basis in starting room category at each place
- 07 breakfasts and 07 dinners
- Transportation by NAC Xylo / Scorpio / Innova (as per availability) for arrival / departure transfers and sightseeing as per the itinerary
- Assistance at the airport while arriving and departing
- Oxygen Cylinder in each vehicle while traveling to Nubra/Pangong Only
- Travel Insurance (for age below 69yrs)

**Mics. charges are inclusive of:**

- Ladakh Royalty Fee
- Inner-line permits
- Porterage at hotel and airport
- All applicable luxury/road taxes

**Exclusions:**

- GST will be applicable as per prevailing rates
- Airfares trainfare
- Any monastery entrance fees, Any Joy ride or rafting
- Medical expenses (apart from first aid) and insurance of any kind
- Tips, laundry, liquors, wines, mineral water, telephone charges, camera fee and items of personal nature
- Transportation is not on disposal basis. It is strictly as per the programme, any extra running will be charged extra
- Any expenses arising out of unforeseen circumstances like flight delay / cancellation / hike in fare, strike or any other natural calamities or any emergency evacuation expenses
- Any other item not mentioned in the cost includes section

Note: This package has various inclusions and exclusions, so please carefully read the terms and conditions before booking.

**Summary:**
The 'Customizable Stunning Kashmir With Gulmarg' package is a 6-day tour that explores the breathtaking landscapes of Kashmir, India. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as Sonmarg, Pahalgam, and Gulmarg, as well as a tour of the Mughal Gardens in Srinagar. Participants will enjoy scenic drives, guided tours, and a range of exciting activities, including a shikara ride on Dal Lake and a gondola ride up to the first phase in Gulmarg.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Srinagar, Meals: Dinner
- Arrive at Srinagar airport and check-in at the hotel.
- Enjoy a shikara ride on Dal Lake in the evening.

**Day 2:** Srinagar Excursion, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Visit the famous Mughal Gardens in Srinagar.
- Enjoy a full day excursion to Sonmarg.

**Day 3:** Srinagar to Pahalgam, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Depart for Pahalgam and check-in at the hotel.
- Visit the Avantipura Ruins en route.

**Day 4:** Pahalgam Excursion, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Depart for excursion to Aru, Chandanwadi, and Betab Valley.
- Enjoy leisure activities in the evening.

**Day 5:** Pahalgam to Gulmarg, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Depart for Gulmarg and check-in at the hotel.
- Enjoy a gondola ride up to the first phase.

**Day 6:** Gulmarg to Srinagar, Meals: Breakfast
- Depart for Srinagar and check-in at the hotel.
- Visit the famous Mughal Gardens in Srinagar.

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodation in Twin/Double sharing basis in starting room category at each place
- 06 breakfasts and 05 dinners
- Transportation by A/c vehicle for arrival / departure transfers and sightseeing as per the itinerary
- Assistance at the airport while arriving and departing
- Travel Insurance (for age below 69yrs)

**Mics. charges are inclusive of:**

- GST will be applicable as per prevailing rates
- Ladakh Royalty Fee
- Inner-line permits
- Porterage at hotel and airport
- All applicable luxury/road taxes

**Exclusions:**

- Tips & Porterage
- Any monument entrance fees, camera fees, guide charges
- Any expenses of personal nature

- Any other item not mentioned in the cost includes section

**Summary:** The 'Fantastic Fiji - The Pearl' package is a 4-day tour that explores the beauty of Fiji. The itinerary includes visits to a Fijian waterfall, a Fijian village, and the Pearl Resort, where you can enjoy non-motorized water sports and a 30-minute tropical massage. The package also includes return airport transfers, daily breakfast, and one course lunch at the Deli restaurant.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Fiji, Meals: N/A
- Arrive at Nadi International Airport and transfer to the hotel
- Rest of the day is at leisure

**Day 2:** Fijian Waterfall Tour, Meals: Breakfast
- Visit one of the amazing waterfalls in Fiji on this exclusive tour
- Enjoy a scenic 8-minute walk through farming land to a pristine waterfall
- Return to the hotel and relax

**Day 3:** Fijian Village Tour, Meals: Breakfast and One course Lunch at the Deli
- Visit the Fiji Culture Village to learn about Fijian people and their culture and history
- Enjoy a one course lunch at the Deli restaurant
- Opt for non-motorized water sports courtesy of the resort

**Day 4:** Departure, Meals: Breakfast
- Check out from the hotel and proceed to Nadi Airport for your onward flight

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodation in Superior Room at The Pearl Resort or similar
- Daily Breakfast (except Day 1)
- One course lunch at Deli restaurant
- Return airport transfers with private basis
- Free Fijian Waterfall Tour for 3
- Free Fijian Village Tour for 3
- Free 30-minute tropical massage for 2 per stay
- Free non-motorized water sports
- Overseas travel insurance (up to 60 yrs age group only)

**Mics. charges are inclusive of:**

- GST will be applicable as per prevailing rates
- Airport taxes & Visa charges
- Ladakh Royalty Fee
- Inner-line permits
- Porterage at hotel and airport
- All applicable luxury/road taxes

**Exclusions:**

- International air ticket, Domestic ticket if any
- TCS and GST is not included in the above cost and will be charged on final amount
